Iran x Israel/US Conflict Market Dominates X Chatter | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Polymarket's most active X-related market assigns 97% odds to the conflict ending by December 31, 2026, with over $121M in total X prediction volume signaling heavy trader focus on this amid real-time odds shifts.[1]
